title: Submit CV
description: Applicants can submit their CVs for parsing and analysis.

title: View and Edit CV
description: Applicants can view and edit their parsed CV.

title: Answer Screening Questions
description: Applicants are presented with screening questions defined by an expert recruiter.

title: Get Rating for CV
description: Applicants receive a rating for their CV based on the similarity between the applicant's CV and the job requirements.
